Finding.Description: LL-24 content has not been provided. Without LL-24 content, we cannot verify refinements, dependencies, or traceability (including interactions with LL-LOC-7.1).
Finding.Solution: Provide LL-24.xml contents (or paste its requirements) so LL-24 refinements, dependencies, and traceability can be verified. After receipt, generate the full Findings/Implementations document for LL-24 and perform complete traceability validation, including LL-LOC-7.1 interactions.
